# Askēsis (ascetic training)

Askēsis names disciplined practice, the training of body and mind toward virtue: voluntary deprivations, meditations, repeated efforts that forge self-mastery. The word comes from the Greek askein, to exercise, as an athlete trains. Cynics and Stoics make it the heart of a philosophical life, conceived less as a theory than as a practice.

**At stake in** : [Bodily pleasures](../axes/bodily-pleasures.md) · [Scope of action](../axes/control-scope.md)
